name: hermeneia
description: Read, search, and send WhatsApp messages from Claude. Drag to install, scan a QR code, and you're done.

qr_port.title: Setup Page Port
qr_port.description: Port for the QR code page (default: 3456). Change if the port is in use.

epistole_mirror_url.title: Epistole mirror URL (beta — optional)
epistole_mirror_url.description: Only relevant if you have your own Epistole server (a Cloudflare Worker you deploy separately — see the Hermeneia README). Enabling this lets you search your WhatsApp history from the Claude mobile apps alongside email. Leave empty if you don't know what this is.

epistole_mirror_token.title: Epistole mirror token (beta — optional)
epistole_mirror_token.description: The secret password your Epistole server expects (named WA_BRIDGE_TOKEN on the Epistole side). You set this value when you deployed Epistole. If you can't find it, see the 'Where to find your token' section of the Hermeneia README — you can also rotate it. Leave empty if the URL above is empty.

epistole_mirror_accounts.title: Epistole account allowlist (beta — optional)
epistole_mirror_accounts.description: Which WhatsApp accounts to mirror, comma-separated (e.g. 'personal,work'). Leave empty to mirror every connected account — this is what most people want.

tools.name: check_status
tools.description: Check WhatsApp connection status and get setup instructions if needed

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or phone number

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Look up a contact by phone number or JID

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: Get messages with filters, date ranges, and sorting

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a text message to a contact or group

tools.name: send_file
tools.description: Send an image, video, or document

tools.name: download_media
tools.description: Download media from a received message

tools.name: get_chat
tools.description: Get specific chat metadata by JID

tools.name: get_direct_chat_by_contact
tools.description: Find a DM chat with a contact

tools.name: get_contact_chats
tools.description: List all chats involving a contact

tools.name: get_last_interaction
tools.description: Get the last message with a contact

tools.name: get_message_context
tools.description: Get messages around a specific message

tools.name: add_account
tools.description: Connect a new WhatsApp account via QR code

tools.name: remove_account
tools.description: Disconnect and remove a WhatsApp account

tools.name: epistole_backfill
tools.description: BETA: push existing WhatsApp history to the configured Epistole mirror
